dict.string: FleetNeuron Driver needs access to your photo library to upload proof of delivery, BOL, lumper, and roadside receipts.
FleetNeuron Driver can use the camera to capture documents for your loads.
FleetNeuron Driver shows your current location on the map to help you navigate your assigned loads.
FleetNeuron Driver uses Face ID or Touch ID to unlock the app when you choose to enable it.
